treatment_journey.name: mesalamine
treatment_journey.evidence: Started standard protocol - mesalamine, then added azathioprine. Minimal improvement.

treatment_journey.name: azathioprine
treatment_journey.evidence: Started standard protocol - mesalamine, then added azathioprine. Minimal improvement.

treatment_journey.name: Remicade
treatment_journey.evidence: Remicade first... Worked for a year then allergic reaction during infusion.

treatment_journey.name: Humira
treatment_journey.evidence: Switched to Humira... effectiveness limited... Still not controlled.

treatment_journey.name: methotrexate
treatment_journey.evidence: Added methotrexate. Hair started falling out... Doctor discussing combination therapy - Stelara plus methotrexate plus who knows what else.

treatment_journey.name: Stelara
treatment_journey.evidence: Started Stelara... Been on it eighteen months.

pathway_endpoint.reasoning: Finally approved. Been on it eighteen months. It's okay. Not great, just okay.

referral_pathway.name: Gastroenterologist
referral_pathway.evidence: Finally, third did proper testing. Colonoscopy showed Crohn's throughout colon and terminal ileum.
